metaTitle: Resize Image to Target KB — Exact File Size Compressor (100% Private)
metaDescription: Need to hit a specific file size like 200KB or 500KB? Our 'Smart-Binary' algorithm automatically finds the best quality for your target. No uploads, no quality guesswork, 100% secure.
introSummary: Struggling with strict file size limits on government portals or job applications? Most compressors make you guess the quality percentage. Our 'Precision-Engine' flips the logic: you set the target (e.g., 200KB), and our binary-search algorithm automatically finds the highest possible quality that fits. Powered by local browser processing, your sensitive documents never leave your device. It's the smartest, safest way to meet exact upload requirements.

contextUsage.title: For Government & Visa Portals
contextUsage.desc: Perfect for official applications (Passport, Visa, Exam entries) that demand strict 'under 200KB' or 'under 500KB' limits.

contextUsage.title: For Employment & Portfolios
contextUsage.desc: Ensure your resume photos or portfolio samples fit within email or job board attachment constraints without losing clarity.

contextUsage.title: For Privacy-First Document Handling
contextUsage.desc: Process sensitive IDs, certificates, or personal photos locally in your RAM. No server logs, no data privacy risks.

howto.description: Drag and drop your JPG, PNG, or WebP file. We support high-resolution photos up to 30MB.
Enter your desired maximum file size (e.g., 200). You can also use our quick presets for common upload limits.
Click 'Compress to Target'. Our algorithm will perform a binary search (up to 10 iterations) to find the perfect quality match.
Review the final size and quality metrics, then save your optimized image instantly to your device.

why: Goal-Oriented Logic — Stop guessing percentages. Just tell us the size you need, and we'll do the math.
Binary Search Optimization — Our algorithm tries multiple quality levels in milliseconds to find the 'Sweet Spot' for your target.
Zero-Server Architecture — Your files stay in your browser. We never see your data, ensuring total privacy for sensitive documents.
Resolution Auto-Scaling — If quality adjustment isn't enough, we intelligently scale dimensions to hit your target while maintaining readability.
Instant Visual Feedback — See exactly how much quality was adjusted and how many pixels were saved before you download.
100% Free & Unlimited — No watermarks, no 'Pro' tiers. Just a professional utility for precise file management.

faq.a: Unlike normal sliders, our tool runs a 'test' compression internally several times using different settings until it finds the highest quality that stays just under your limit.

faq.q: What if the target is too small for the image?
faq.a: If lowering the quality isn't enough, the engine will automatically scale down the resolution (width/height) to ensure we reach your KB goal.

faq.q: Is my data safe with HugDot?
faq.a: Yes. This tool runs entirely on your CPU and RAM. No data is transmitted to any server, making it safe for IDs and official documents.
Currently, this precision tool is optimized for single-file perfection to ensure the highest quality results for each specific target.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Converges on target file size in <1 second
Ensures target match even for ultra-small KB limits
Works seamlessly on mobile and desktop browsers

troubleshooting: Target not reached? The image might be too complex. Try a slightly higher KB target or allow the auto-scaling to reduce resolution.
Image looks blurry? If the target KB is extremely low (e.g., 10KB), significant quality loss is unavoidable. Try a 50KB or 100KB target if possible.
Process timed out? High-resolution images on older mobile devices can take longer. Try closing other browser tabs.
proTips: Use 195KB for a 200KB limit! It's always safer to aim 2-5% below the hard limit to account for how different servers calculate file size.
WebP is your friend! If the destination site allows it, choose WebP for the best possible quality at low file sizes.
Check the Original! Always keep your original high-res photo. This tool creates a 'purpose-built' copy for specific uploads.
